prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! It’s completely normal to feel a bit hesitant when diving into a challenging task, but remember, you’re capable of so much more than you realize. Just take it one step at a time. Break it down, focus on what you can accomplish right now, and before you know it, you’ll be halfway through. You’ve faced tough tasks before, and you’ve come through them stronger and more experienced. This is no different. Trust in your abilities, and don’t forget to give yourself a little pat on the back along the way. You’re amazing, and you can do this!
